message:
style(engine): minor Rust idiom improvements across 6 modules

Small non-behavioral refactorings that improve Rust idiom usage:

- anti_entropy.rs: Remove unnecessary .clone() on ObjectId test value (use move)
- capability_witness.rs: Simplify closure syntax in test map function
- lowering_pipeline.rs: Remove unused import in test module
- obstruction_certificate.rs: Use array literal [] instead of vec![] for empty init
- revocation_enforcement.rs: Use stats.values() instead of destructuring in for loop
- supervision.rs: Replace double negative !(a == b) with direct inequality a != b

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
